docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-06-2019 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE $20.00 - SERVED JUL-05-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BJORKLUND, EMILY
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SONG, JORDAN AS TO DEFENDANT BJORKLUND, EMILY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-06-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED NOV-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-06-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-06-2019 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL. PLAINTIFF JORDAN SONG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EMILY BJORKLUND IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SONG, JORDAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BJORKLUND, EMILY PLAINTIFF FAILED TO ESTABLISH AN AGREEMENT WITH DEFENDANT. CLAIM FOR ORAL AGREEMENT IS BARRED BY STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS (2 YEARS). STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
STIPULATION FOR CASE TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE PRO TEM. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY SONG, JORDAN BJORKLUND, EMILY
